variants: Felicitas Buchwald, a distinguished figure in the realm of artistic design, currently resides in Cloudvale Market after her humble beginnings in Copperhill Bluffs. She is widely recognized for her influential work titled the Redwing Synthesis Blueprint, which has made significant contributions to her field. Her excellence in artistry was honored with the prestigious Beryl Atlas Insignia, reflecting her dedication and creativity. Additionally, Felicitas is an active member of the Keeprite Ice Sculptors, where she collaborates with fellow artists and shares her passion for ice sculpting. Through her innovative approaches and community involvement, Felicitas continues to inspire those around her.
